titles.en: Chapter 10 – The greeting upon the women
Chapter 10 – The greeting upon the women

segments: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) يُسَلِّمُ عَلَى النِّسَاءِ وَ يَرْدُدْنَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامَ وَ كَانَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) يُسَلِّمُ عَلَى النِّسَاءِ وَ كَانَ يَكْرَهُ أَنْ يُسَلِّمَ عَلَى الشَّابَّةِ مِنْهُنَّ وَ يَقُولُ أَتَخَوَّفُ أَنْ يُعْجِبَنِي صَوْتُهَا فَيَدْخُلَ عَلَيَّ أَكْثَرُ مِمَّا أَطْلُبُ مِنَ الْأَجْرِ .
arabic.text: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) يُسَلِّمُ عَلَى النِّسَاءِ وَ يَرْدُدْنَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامَ وَ كَانَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) يُسَلِّمُ عَلَى النِّسَاءِ وَ كَانَ يَكْرَهُ أَنْ يُسَلِّمَ عَلَى الشَّابَّةِ مِنْهُنَّ وَ يَقُولُ أَتَخَوَّفُ أَنْ يُعْجِبَنِي صَوْتُهَا فَيَدْخُلَ عَلَيَّ أَكْثَرُ مِمَّا أَطْلُبُ مِنَ الْأَجْرِ .

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Rabi’e Bin Abdullah,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘It was so that Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> would greet (السَّلَامُ) upon the women and they were returning the greeting upon him<sup>saww</sup>; and it was so that Amir Al Momineen<sup>asws</sup> would greet (السَّلَامُ) upon the women, and he<sup>asws</sup> used to dislike greeting (السَّلَامُ) upon the young ones from them, and he<sup>asws</sup> was saying (it is so that): ‘One should be afraid that her voice might astound him, so what would enter upon him would be more than what he is seeking from the Recompense’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa, from Rabi’e Bin Abdullah,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘It was so that Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> would greet (السَّلَامُ) upon the women and they were returning the greeting upon him<sup>saww</sup>; and it was so that Amir Al Momineen<sup>asws</sup> would greet (السَّلَامُ) upon the women, and he<sup>asws</sup> used to dislike greeting (السَّلَامُ) upon the young ones from them, and he<sup>asws</sup> was saying (it is so that): ‘One should be afraid that her voice might astound him, so what would enter upon him would be more than what he is seeking from the Recompense’.

segments: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from Rib’i ibn ‘Abd Allah from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah would offer greeting of peace to women and they would respond to him. Amir al-Mu’ minin, Ali ibn abu Talib (a.s.) would offer greeting of peace to women but he disliked offering it to the young women. He would say, ‘I fear their voice may attract me and a feeling may cause me more harm than the reward for offering the greeting of peace.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Hammad ibn ‘Isa from Rib’i ibn ‘Abd Allah from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah would offer greeting of peace to women and they would respond to him. Amir al-Mu’ minin, Ali ibn abu Talib (a.s.) would offer greeting of peace to women but he disliked offering it to the young women. He would say, ‘I fear their voice may attract me and a feeling may cause me more harm than the reward for offering the greeting of peace.’”

gradings.label: حسن
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/545)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ رِبْعِيِّ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
